python.title: Reading code: literal trace
objectives: trace execution of a 5-15 line snippet ≥ 90% accuracy by end of stage
identify the printed/returned value of a deterministic snippet within 60 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Before answering, mentally simulate the snippet line by line. After answering, note which line surprised you.

python.title: Common runtime errors
objectives: predict the runtime exception class of a flawed snippet ≥ 85% accuracy by end of stage
distinguish NullPointer-like vs TypeError-like failures within 90 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: What input value would make this code crash? Re-evaluate after seeing the answer.

python.title: Idiomatic syntax & style
objectives: select the idiomatic option over the literal-correct option ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
spot a redundant construct (double negation, useless variable) within 45 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Is there a shorter, language-native way to express this? Rate your confidence 1-5.

python.title: Off-by-one and boundary edges
objectives: identify the off-by-one boundary in a loop or slice ≥ 85% accuracy by end of stage
predict behavior on empty input within 60 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Trace the loop with n=0 and n=1. Which iteration counts differ?

python.title: Truthy/falsy & comparison pitfalls
objectives: distinguish == vs === / is vs == semantics ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
predict short-circuit eval order within 45 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Would the result change if 0, '', or None replaced the input?

python.title: Mutability & reference semantics
objectives: spot unintended shared-reference bugs ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
decide between shallow and deep copy within 60 seconds given a mutation scenario
python.metacog_prompt: Does mutating arg also mutate the caller's variable? Reason before answering.

python.title: Performance: complexity & hot paths
objectives: estimate time complexity of a 10-30 line snippet within 90 seconds
identify the dominant cost line ≥ 75% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: Which line runs the most times? Estimate big-O before reading options.

python.title: Resource & lifetime management
objectives: identify missed close/drop/free within 60 seconds ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
predict resource leak under exception path within 75 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: What happens if an exception fires before the close call? Trace both branches.

python.title: Input validation & injection
objectives: identify the injection sink in 15-30 line code within 90 seconds
select the parameterized fix over string-concat fix ≥ 90% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: Which variable came from user input and reaches an interpreter unchanged?

python.title: Error handling & retry semantics
objectives: spot a swallowed-exception anti-pattern within 60 seconds ≥ 85% accuracy by end of stage
decide whether a failed op is safe to retry ≥ 75% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: What information is lost when this exception is caught? Could the retry double-execute a side effect?

python.title: Concurrency: races & atomicity
objectives: identify the race window in a 2-thread snippet within 120 seconds
select the atomic primitive over coarse-lock option ≥ 75% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: Interleave the two threads at every line break - does any ordering produce the wrong result?

python.title: Memory & UB hazards
objectives: spot use-after-free / dangling-ref within 90 seconds ≥ 75% accuracy by end of stage
predict integer overflow wraparound result ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: What is the value at the boundary (INT_MAX, 0, -1)? Walk the arithmetic.

python.title: Crypto & auth correctness
objectives: distinguish MD5/SHA-1 vs SHA-256/Argon2 contexts ≥ 90% accuracy by end of stage
spot non-constant-time compare in auth code within 60 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Where could a timing or length leak give an attacker information? Reflect after answering.

python.title: Concurrency: ordering & memory model
objectives: identify deadlock due to lock ordering within 120 seconds ≥ 70% accuracy by end of stage
spot missing happens-before edge between producer and consumer within 120 seconds
python.metacog_prompt: Draw the lock acquisition order across both paths. Does any reverse ordering exist?

python.title: Architecture-level review
objectives: recognize hidden coupling between modules within 120 seconds ≥ 70% accuracy by end of stage
identify stringly-typed API smell ≥ 80% accuracy by end of stage
python.metacog_prompt: If you renamed a field, how many files would change? Reflect on the cost of the abstraction.
